title: Smart Capture Camera for iOS
summaryBody: As part of our migration from Sensibill to Textract, on iOS we will replace the Sensibill camera with a custom built camera.
detailBody: As part of our migration from Sensibill to Textract, on iOS we will replace the Sensibill camera with a custom built camera.
